name: cassette
description: Build a Mode-A cassette: read a single BoundaryHit on stdin, copy the source JSONL verbatim up to the boundary, write atomically (tmp + rename) under /tmp/ or --output, write 3 sidecars (.json, .name-cache, .source) under ~/.claude/session-states/, optionally inject an inline ccipc_meta field on the first user-message line for self-describing cassettes. Refuses >1 stdin record (exit 7).
